title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, Vice President and Head of Google Research, discusses the "magic cycle" of research from breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation covers AI tools for scientific discovery, speculative decoding, generative UI, and recent milestones including the Willow quantum chip.
writeup: Yossi Matias, Vice President and Head of Google Research, lays out what he calls the "magic cycle" that moves research from breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation spans AI tools for scientific discovery, speculative decoding, generative UI, and the Willow quantum chip, with concepts including test-time compute and quantum gates. It matters because it connects laboratory advances to deployed products and shows how Google Research frames the path between the two.
